---
pagetitle: "SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool | Mesfin Genie"
description: "A benefit-cost analysis tool for agricultural production trials, reporting net present value, benefit-cost ratio, return on investment, and sensitivity analysis."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell">
<p class="eyebrow">Tool · Economic evaluation</p>
<h1>SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</h1>
<p>Benefit-cost analysis for farm-practice and soil-management trials.</p>
</div></header>

<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow">
<h2>The problem</h2>
<p>Deciding whether an agricultural trial or soil-management intervention is worth its cost requires transparent economic appraisal under uncertainty.</p>
<h2>Intended users</h2>
<p>Researchers and partners evaluating agricultural production trials.</p>
<h2>Inputs and outputs</h2>
<p>Users supply trial assumptions and costs; the tool returns net present value, benefit-cost ratio, return on investment, and sensitivity analysis under alternative scenarios.</p>
<h2>Methodological basis</h2>
<p>Standard benefit-cost analysis with user-supplied assumptions and explicit sensitivity ranges.</p>
<h2>Credits</h2>
<p>Project lead and publisher: Dr Frank Wogbe Agbola. Developed with Dr Mesfin Genie.</p>
<h2>Limitations</h2>
<p>Results depend on the assumptions entered and are intended to support appraisal and discussion.</p>
<p><a class="button-primary" href="/farming-bca-tool-v18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open the tool</a></p>
</div></section>
<script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"SoftwareApplication","name":"SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool","applicationCategory":"Economic evaluation tool","operatingSystem":"Web","url":"https://mesfingenie.com/farming-bca-tool-v18/","author":{"@type":"Person","name":"Mesfin Genie"}}</script>

```
